steps.assistant_text: USO address resolver (USO slot-pointer table scan at D_80012D60..D_80012F7C, 135 entries; IDO -O2 unrolls x4 with a 3-iteration prologue since 135%4==3). Cracked from 61.8% to 100% via: (1) array-form fixed-count loop `for(i=0;i<135;i++)` so IDO constant-folds the trip count into the prologue+4x-unroll; (2) member-access add operand order `e->field_4C + e->field_14`; (3) KEY LEVER from permuter: declaring `tbl` INSIDE the loop body forces IDO to recompute the table base each iteration, matching the target register coloring exactly. Verified full `make clean && make` produces byte-identical ROM (cmp clean vs baserom).

metadata.verification: objdiff 100%; full clean build ROM byte-identical to baserom (cmp clean)
